name: Pineapple Cheesecake Square
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Whipping Cream or Cool Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain pineapple and reserve 1 cup juice.
2. Prepare the crust.
3. Beat cream cheese in a medium bowl until smooth and fluffy.
4. Beat in 1/2 cup sugar and eggs.
5. Stir in 2/3 cup pineapple juice.
6. Pour over hot crust and bake just until center is set, about 20 minutes in. Cool completely.
7. Mix flour and 1/4 cup sugar in a 2-quart saucepan.
8. Stir in the reserved 1 cup pineapple juice. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
9. Boil and stir 1 minute. Remove from heat, fold in pineapple.
10. Cool completely.
11. If not using cool whip, beat whipping cream in chilled bowl until stiff.
12. Fold whipped cream or cool whip into pineapple mixture.
13. Spread carefully over dessert.
14. Cover loosely and refrigerate until firm, about 4 hours.
15. Cut into 3-inch squares. Makes 12 squares.
